calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance; Notice having been given, and there being no appearance or objection, the court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b); Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2018 Continued To Aug-28-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to AUG-28-2018 at 10:30am in Department 610. ***NOTICE: Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b).*** Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
